summary: Frontend-only regression test after reaper lantern glow CSS repositioning. Home page loads cleanly, reaper background and lantern glow render correctly with lantern glow now positioned over the reaper's actual hanging lantern on the right side of the image (not over the head). Spin flow, tabs, and filters all functional. No console errors or warnings.

verification_details.spin_flow: ZIP 10001 -> Deal Your Fate -> result card revealed (Hudson Yards Tavern) with data-testid=reaper-line text: 'Your fate is written.'
filters_verified: Gluten Free chip visible on Food tab

context_for_next_testing_agent: Lantern glow position verified at left:89.3%/top:27.5% of reaper container - lands squarely on the reaper's lantern. Screenshot confirms glow overlays the hanging lantern on right side of the skeleton reaper figure, not the skull/head. All Home page critical flows pass with no regressions.
